name: 107 Hoover Criminals
description: The 107 Hoover Criminals are a subset of the Hoover Criminal Gang on the West Side of South Los Angeles along Hoover Street between Vermont and Figueroa Avenues, centered around 107th Street. In 2020, a joint FBI-LAPD investigation dubbed 'Operation Hoover Dam' led to federal indictments for distributing methamphetamine, crack cocaine, and PCP from a South LA storefront.
